  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder accruedInterestAmount(DecimalCreate accruedInterestAmount)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder accruedInterestAmount(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> accruedInterestAmount)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • bondYield

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder bondYield(List<BondYieldCreate> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • bondYield

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder bondYield(Optional<? extends List<BondYieldCreate>> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • commissionAmount

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder commissionAmount(DecimalCreate commissionAmount)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • commissionAmount

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder commissionAmount(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> commissionAmount)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • executionTime

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder executionTime(OffsetDateTime executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the execution took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • executionTime

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder executionTime(Optional<OffsetDateTime> executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the execution took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • externalId

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder externalId(String externalId)
      Used to generate execution_id, should be unique on the day for each source_application caller.

    • grossAmount

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder grossAmount(DecimalCreate grossAmount)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder grossAmount(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> grossAmount)

    • memo

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder memo(String memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • memo

      public ExecutionCreate.Builder memo(Optional<String> memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.
